codeReview.summary: The fix addresses both failures from the prior review. `normalize_address()` now normalizes attached directional+number forms (e.g., NW7th) to match spaced variants (NW 7th) before hashing, and tests now enforce true idempotency by asserting `normalize_address(normalize_address(addr))`. Added tests also verify directional no-space equivalence at normalization and hash levels, which is sufficient for dedup correctness because `deduplicate_leads()` is hash-based.

summary: Reviewed fix-directional-address-normalization using prior failure context, handoff, commit diff, and transcript skeleton. Commit 6f2bccc resolves the NW7th vs NW 7th canonicalization gap and corrects idempotency test coverage, so the re-run fix passes review.
